name: PLNCLOSEDELSH
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[PLNCLOSEDELSH] ON [dbo].[SIPARISHAREKETLERI]
FOR DELETE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE @SD_REF AS INT
DECLARE Dcur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
select D.SD_REF from DELETED D WHERE D.KAPALI=0 GROUP BY D.SD_REF
OPEN Dcur;  
FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur 
INTO @SD_REF;
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
BEGIN  
	UPDATE PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI SET STATUS=1 WHERE STATUS=0 AND SD_REF=@SD_REF
FETCH NEXT FROM Dcur
INTO @SD_REF;
END  
CLOSE Dcur;  
DEALLOCATE Dcur;
